integrations.title: Mobile Money Payment Integration
integrations.description: Real-time mobile money payments through MTN Mobile Money and Airtel Money. Send payment to +256790206354 and receive instant confirmation.
integrations.benefit: Enables digital payments for 80% of Ugandan consumers who prefer mobile money over cards. Fast, secure, and low transaction fees.

integrations.title: Cash on Delivery
integrations.description: Pay when your order arrives. Secure payment method for customers who prefer not to pay online.
integrations.benefit: Reduces payment friction for customers without credit cards or digital payment access.

integrations.title: WhatsApp Channel Support
integrations.description: Join our WhatsApp channel for order updates, product news, and customer support. Link: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbCseMv7IUYSEy2fqX2P
integrations.benefit: Stay connected with real-time notifications and direct support without using mobile data.

integrations.title: Direct Customer Support
integrations.description: Contact us via WhatsApp at 0790206354, call +256790206354 or +256787772067, or email lawrenceomoit66y@gmail.com for any inquiries.
integrations.benefit: Multiple communication channels for your convenience. Quick response times and dedicated support team.

integrations.title: Local Pickup and Delivery Network
integrations.description: Offer pickup locations in Kampala, Jinja, and Gulu plus last-mile delivery partnerships with local couriers.
integrations.benefit: Speeds delivery and lowers shipping costs for rural customers.

integrations.title: Vendor Price Sync
integrations.description: Automatically mirror electronics prices from marketplaces like Techno, Samsung, and Hisense wholesale suppliers for better sourcing decisions.
integrations.benefit: Keeps catalog prices competitive and avoids inventory mismatches.

integrations.title: SMS Order Tracking
integrations.description: Receive order updates via SMS or WhatsApp to your registered phone number so you can follow shipments without mobile data.
integrations.benefit: Improves trust and reduces customer support inquiries.
